content.text: I’ll locate the Ollama running-model classes and existing tests so I can add a focused reproduction before fixing the mapping.

content.text: I found the `RunningOllamaModel` class and related tests; I’ll inspect the model and response mapping code next.

I found the relevant `RunningOllamaModel` DTO and confirmed it uses Jackson snake_case mapping, so a `contextLength` Java field should bind to Ollama’s `context_length` JSON property. Next I’ll add a focused temporary regression test that deserializes a running-model response and asserts the field is preserved.

file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
    <parent>
        <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
        <artifactId>langchain4j-parent</artifactId>
        <version>1.13.0-beta23-SNAPSHOT</version>
        <relativePath>../langchain4j-parent/pom.xml</relativePath>
    </parent>

    <artifactId>langchain4j-ollama</artifactId>
    <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
    <name>LangChain4j :: Integration :: Ollama</name>

    <properties>
        <skipOllamaITs>${skipITs}</skipOllamaITs>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-core</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-http-client</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-http-client-jdk</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-annotations</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-core</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- test dependencies -->

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.testcontainers</groupId>
            <artifactId>ollama</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-core</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <classifier>tests</classifier>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-http-client</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <classifier>tests</classifier>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <classifier>tests</classifier>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>dev.langchain4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>langchain4j-open-ai</artifactId>
            <version>1.13.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.squareup.okhttp3</groupId>
            <artifactId>mockwebserver</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
            <exclusions>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>junit</groupId>
                    <artifactId>junit</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
            </exclusions>
        </dependency>

    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>test-jar</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-failsafe-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <skipITs>${skipOllamaITs}</skipITs>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

content.text: I found `RunningOllamaModel` and confirmed it currently has no `contextLength` property, so I’m checking how `/api/ps` responses are deserialized before adding the regression test.

M langchain4j-ollama/src/main/java/dev/langchain4j/model/ollama/RunningOllamaModel.java

content.text:
Implemented the fix for `RunningOllamaModel` so Ollama’s `context_length` response field is now preserved.

Summary:
- Added `contextLength` field to `RunningOllamaModel`.
- Added `getContextLength()` / `setContextLength(...)`.
- Updated the package-private constructor and builder to carry `contextLength`.
- Verified Jackson snake_case mapping will deserialize `context_length` into `contextLength` via the existing `@JsonNaming(PropertyNamingStrategies.SnakeCaseStrategy.class)` annotation.
- Wrote a temporary regression test that reproduced the missing getter/field issue, confirmed it failed before the fix, then passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary test file as requested.

Validation run:
- `./mvnw -pl langchain4j-ollama -Dtest=RunningOllamaModelTest test` passed after the fix.

Current git changes:
- Modified: `langchain4j-ollama/src/main/java/dev/langchain4j/model/ollama/RunningOllamaModel.java`

result:

- Verified Jackson snake_case mapping will deserialize `context_length` into `contextLength` via the existing `@JsonNaming(PropertyNamingStrategies.SnakeCaseStrategy.class)` annotation.
- Wrote a temporary regression test that reproduced the missing getter/field issue, confirmed it failed before the fix, then passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary test file as requested.
